caption: In the video, two men are seated side by side against a backdrop featuring lush jungle scenery and the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle." The man on the left is bald, wearing a dark blue long-sleeve shirt and a gold chain necklace, while the man on the right has short black hair, glasses, and is dressed in a black long-sleeve shirt with red accents. Both appear to be engaged in a conversation or interview, as they are smiling and looking towards each other. The setting suggests a promotional event for the movie, with the men likely discussing their experiences or sharing insights related to the film. The atmosphere is friendly and relaxed, indicating a positive interaction between the two.
